purpose: Root tracker for Sybeorg prospect mockups, outreach angles, draft status, and next-batch queue.

positioning.coreAngle: Lead with proof, not pitch: Sybeorg already built a no-obligation custom landing-page mockup for the prospect, focused on converting emergency/service calls on mobile.
riskGuardrails: Do not imply partnership, endorsement, or that the business requested the mockup.
Avoid quoting unverified review counts or fabricated testimonials in outreach.
Use the phrase sample/mockup/concept so the recipient understands it is a preview, not a live replacement site.
positioning.bestCTA: Ask permission for a quick yes/no review: 'Worth polishing this up for you?' or offer a 15-minute call.

currentProspects.angle: Small-town emergency HVAC page that makes Bobby/owner-operator trust the hero, with phone-first mobile CTA.
Their current site already has solid service proof; the pitch is a sharper mobile emergency-call landing page for paid search / urgent calls.
Family-owned/local/licensed proof is strong; position the mockup as a cleaner same-day-service funnel for mobile visitors.
Master-plumber trust + emergency water-heater/leak CTA; good fit for a dedicated conversion page separate from general web presence.
One-call plumbing/HVAC/electrical convenience; pitch the mockup as a simple page that makes emergency visitors call or text fast.

currentProspects.market: Des Moines / Polk, Warren, Dallas County
currentProspects.angle: Forty-year craftsman/trust story; outreach should feel respectful and personal, not agency-bro salesy.
Auto repair landing-page concept built around restoring trust after the public site currently fails with an expired-certificate warning.
Auto repair concept for a shop whose current website route lands on a Google sign-in screen instead of a public page.
Starter website concept for a tree-service listing with strong rating signal but no website button in Google Maps limited view.

currentProspects.business: Eastern Iowa Spray Foam & Waterproofing LLC
currentProspects.angle: Waterproofing concept to modernize an older Hibu-style site and make basement flooding, sump pumps, and estimates clearer on mobile.

nextBatchQueue.reason: High-intent searches, easy before/after website gap spotting, strong template already exists.
Emergency-driven, seasonal urgency, simple landing-page economics.
Higher ticket services and clear booking CTA; needs softer premium design than trades.

gmail.note: Himalaya v1.2.0 can access sybeorg, majidclawbot, and radi Gmail accounts. Outbound sending still requires Stark approval per Hermes safety rules.
